text: The surgeon makes an incision at the mesosalpinx region using a laparoscopic shearer, extending it to allow the removal of a large para-ovarian cyst. Gentle traction and counter traction are applied to detach and extract the cyst intact from its attachment at the mesosalpines.

The surgeon applies gentle traction to deliver the para-ovarian cyst intact from the mesosalpines. The cyst is then ruptured, and the fluid is aspirated before the cyst wall is removed from the peritoneal cavity.
